candidates.text: This has been going on for 80 years, and heavily documented. The NYTimes finally scraped together enough integrity to publish something. https://t.co/NVfAp9nAZ5 https://t.co/EJpUteSaR5

By far THE most annoying part of running a business for me is collecting receipts for my accountant

Every month my accountants hounds me for invoices and receipts of every single expense I did, doesn't matter how tiny like $0.50, sometimes also for income (I don't know why) http
